summary: All scoring fixes validated and pushed (162183d). Full benchmark run launched. Next session: analyze results in benchmark-results/.

results.description: Fixed architecture-cascade scoring: pattern-group detection for decisionPropagation + new decisionDiscovery metric. Pushed as 162183d.

Validated all 3 scenarios with smoke tests (8 runs total). context-recovery and bug-investigation differentiate well. architecture-cascade now differentiates via decisionDiscovery (baseline=0, full-twining=30).

Full benchmark run launched: 4 scenarios × 5 conditions × 3 runs = 60 iterations, 135 agent sessions, ~$121 estimated. Command: node dist/cli/index.js run --scenario refactoring-handoff,architecture-cascade,bug-investigation,context-recovery --condition baseline,claude-md-only,file-reload-structured,full-twining,twining-lite --runs 3 --seed initial-results-v1 --budget 250
results.notes: Results will be in benchmark-results/<run-id>/. Next session should: (1) find the latest run ID, (2) analyze scores across all scenarios/conditions, (3) look for statistical patterns and Twining signal, (4) generate summary report.
